gitCommit.subject: feat(cf_recon): P7–P10 — close all stale remediations & fix all circular references (#987)
gitCommit.body:
feat(cf_recon): P7–P10 — close all stale remediations & fix all circular references (#987)

* feat(cf-recon): reconciliação product_images × Cloudflare Images

Infraestrutura de reconciliação em schema isolado cf_recon (aditivo, não
exposto via PostgREST) + correções de divergências aplicadas em prod via MCP.

- Fundação: cf_image (inventário crawl), crawl_run, action_log (auditoria),
  metric_snapshot, remediation; views v_verification_queue, v_divergence,
  v_cf_orphans, v_health_dashboard.
- 185 referências não-seq confirmadas ausentes no CF → marcadas missing
  (evidência cf_images_batch_check, reversível via action_log).
- 24 imagens ativas+quebradas com irmã verified → desativadas (autopromote
  assumiu a primária); 56 sem substituta → fila de re-upload.
- 5 produtos ativos sem imagem → fila de sourcing.
- Runbook do crawl completo CF→DB (job agendado) e regras de segurança.

Apenas colunas cf_*/last_modified_source mutadas para status (sem cascata de
triggers). Nenhum DELETE físico; nenhuma imagem do CF removida.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MAV1SvJ69G694NWUzo2XeG

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Claude-Session: https://claude.ai/code/session_01MAV1SvJ69G694NWUzo2XeG

* feat(cf_recon): P1–P6 reconciliation improvements — close stale remediations, fix circular reference

Migrations applied (P1–P5):
- 20260619140000: Close 56 stale broken_active_no_replacement remediations
  (pipeline re-verified all CF IDs since queue was opened)
- 20260619140100: Add product_id to action_log for cascade-delete resilience
  (denormalized FK survives ON DELETE CASCADE from product_images)
- 20260617123455: Reconstruct missing migration — soft-delete 11 phantom audit entries (asia-* IDs)
- 20260617124547: Reconstruct missing migration — 3 performance indexes on cf_image/remediation
- 20260619140200: Close 5 stale product_no_active_image remediations
  (products deactivated since queue opened; no longer a live business issue)
- 20260619140300: Fix v_cf_orphans circular reference (root cause fix)
  cf_image was seeded from product_images — same source — so orphan view always returned 0.
  Fix: restrict v_cf_orphans to crawl_run_id IS NOT NULL (real CF API data only).
  Partial crawl bf9095c3 (pages 1–8, 800 images, status=partial) closes the loop.

Runbook (P6):
- docs/runbooks/CF_RECONCILIATION.md updated with circular reference root cause analysis,
  CASCADE FK risk, 14 triggers caveat, missing migrations gap, and full crawl job procedure.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MAV1SvJ69G694NWUzo2XeG

* feat(cf_recon): P7–P8 — close 135 stale remediations, fix v_divergence circular

P7 (20260619140400): Close 135 stale recover_url_original remediations.
  Created 2026-06-17 with only cf_image_id (image_db_id=NULL). All 135
  cf_image_ids now have live product_images with cf_sync_status='verified'
  and is_active=true — URL recovery completed by sync pipeline.
  Backfilled image_db_id + product_id; 135 action_log audit entries;
  remediation_open now = 0 (all work items resolved).

P8 (20260619140500): Fix circular reference in v_divergence.
  Same root cause as P5: cf_image was seeded from product_images.verified,
  making the LEFT JOIN trivially match every verified row.
  Added exists_in_cf_confirmed (crawl_run_id IS NOT NULL) column and new
  ok_pending_crawl_confirmation divergence class. 799 images confirmed by
  partial crawl (pages 1-8); 71,139 awaiting full crawl; 0 broken.

Runbook updated to document P7-P8 findings and post-crawl expectations.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MAV1SvJ69G694NWUzo2XeG

* feat(cf_recon): P9–P10 — enrich health dashboard, close 141 false-positive orphan remediations

P9 (20260619140600): Add crawl-layer metrics to v_health_dashboard.
  Appends 5 new columns (cf_backfill_only, cf_crawl_confirmed,
  divergence_ok, divergence_pending, divergence_broken) without
  touching existing 10 columns. Exposes the circular/confirmed split
  directly in the KPI dashboard.
  State: cf_backfill_only=71280, cf_crawl_confirmed=799,
  divergence_ok=799, divergence_pending=71139, divergence_broken=0.

P10 (20260619140700): Close 141 stale cf_orphan_no_pi remediations.
  Created by gap migration auto_detected_migration_20260619 using
  pre-P5 circular backfill detection. All 141 have crawl_run_id=NULL
  (no CF API confirmation) and no product_images owner — cannot take
  action until full crawl completes. Closed with audit trail pointing
  to v_cf_orphans for post-crawl re-evaluation.
  remediation_open = 0; actions_logged = 481.

Runbook updated with P9–P10 findings and expected post-crawl transitions.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MAV1SvJ69G694NWUzo2XeG

* fix(types): adiciona restore_favorite_from_trash ao schema e corrige TS2345/TS2339

- Adiciona `restore_favorite_from_trash` em types.ts (faltava no schema gerado)
  → Fix para 3 erros TS2345 (argumento não reconhecido no rpc())
- Adiciona tipo `RestoreResult` local e casts explícitos no resultado do RPC
  → Fix para 4 erros TS2339 (acesso a .ok/.error/.original_list_changed em Json)
- Remove chamada redundante com _trash_id=null (era dead code antes do lookup real)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MAV1SvJ69G694NWUzo2XeG

* fix: remove marcadores de conflito de CF_RECONCILIATION.md (P7-P10)

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

  CASCADE FK risk, 14 triggers caveat, missing migrations gap, and full crawl job procedure.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MAV1SvJ69G694NWUzo2XeG

* feat(cf_recon): P7–P8 — close 135 stale remediations, fix v_divergence circular

P7 (20260619140400): Close 135 stale recover_url_original remediations.
  Created 2026-06-17 with only cf_image_id (image_db_id=NULL). All 135
  cf_image_ids now have live product_images with cf_sync_status='verified'
  and is_active=true — URL recovery completed by sync pipeline.
  Backfilled image_db_id + product_id; 135 action_log audit entries;
  remediation_open now = 0 (all work items resolved).

P8 (20260619140500): Fix circular reference in v_divergence.
  Same root cause as P5: cf_image was seeded from product_images.verified,
  making the LEFT JOIN trivially match every verified row.
  Added exists_in_cf_confirmed (crawl_run_id IS NOT NULL) column and new
  ok_pending_crawl_confirmation divergence class. 799 images confirmed by
  partial crawl (pages 1-8); 71,139 awaiting full crawl; 0 broken.

Runbook updated to document P7-P8 findings and post-crawl expectations.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MAV1SvJ69G694NWUzo2XeG

* feat(cf_recon): P9–P10 — enrich health dashboard, close 141 false-positive orphan remediations

P9 (20260619140600): Add crawl-layer metrics to v_health_dashboard.
  Appends 5 new columns (cf_backfill_only, cf_crawl_confirmed,
  divergence_ok, divergence_pending, divergence_broken) without
  touching existing 10 columns. Exposes the circular/confirmed split
  directly in the KPI dashboard.
  State: cf_backfill_only=71280, cf_crawl_confirmed=799,
  divergence_ok=799, divergence_pending=71139, divergence_broken=0.

P10 (20260619140700): Close 141 stale cf_orphan_no_pi remediations.
  Created by gap migration auto_detected_migration_20260619 using
  pre-P5 circular backfill detection. All 141 have crawl_run_id=NULL
  (no CF API confirmation) and no product_images owner — cannot take
  action until full crawl completes. Closed with audit trail pointing
  to v_cf_orphans for post-crawl re-evaluation.
  remediation_open = 0; actions_logged = 481.

Runbook updated with P9–P10 findings and expected post-crawl transitions.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MAV1SvJ69G694NWUzo2XeG

* fix(types): adiciona restore_favorite_from_trash ao schema e corrige TS2345/TS2339

- Adiciona `restore_favorite_from_trash` em types.ts (faltava no schema gerado)
  → Fix para 3 erros TS2345 (argumento não reconhecido no rpc())
- Adiciona tipo `RestoreResult` local e casts explícitos no resultado do RPC
  → Fix para 4 erros TS2339 (acesso a .ok/.error/.original_list_changed em Json)
- Remove chamada redundante com _trash_id=null (era dead code antes do lookup real)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MAV1SvJ69G694NWUzo2XeG

* fix: remove marcadores de conflito de CF_RECONCILIATION.md (P7-P10)

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

gitCommit.subject: feat(cf_recon): P7–P10 — close all stale remediations & fix all circular references (#987)
gitCommit.body:
feat(cf_recon): P7–P10 — close all stale remediations & fix all circular references (#987)

* feat(cf-recon): reconciliação product_images × Cloudflare Images

Infraestrutura de reconciliação em schema isolado cf_recon (aditivo, não
exposto via PostgREST) + correções de divergências aplicadas em prod via MCP.

- Fundação: cf_image (inventário crawl), crawl_run, action_log (auditoria),
  metric_snapshot, remediation; views v_verification_queue, v_divergence,
  v_cf_orphans, v_health_dashboard.
- 185 referências não-seq confirmadas ausentes no CF → marcadas missing
  (evidência cf_images_batch_check, reversível via action_log).
- 24 imagens ativas+quebradas com irmã verified → desativadas (autopromote
  assumiu a primária); 56 sem substituta → fila de re-upload.
- 5 produtos ativos sem imagem → fila de sourcing.
- Runbook do crawl completo CF→DB (job agendado) e regras de segurança.

Apenas colunas cf_*/last_modified_source mutadas para status (sem cascata de
triggers). Nenhum DELETE físico; nenhuma imagem do CF removida.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MAV1SvJ69G694NWUzo2XeG

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Claude-Session: https://claude.ai/code/session_01MAV1SvJ69G694NWUzo2XeG

* feat(cf_recon): P1–P6 reconciliation improvements — close stale remediations, fix circular reference

Migrations applied (P1–P5):
- 20260619140000: Close 56 stale broken_active_no_replacement remediations
  (pipeline re-verified all CF IDs since queue was opened)
- 20260619140100: Add product_id to action_log for cascade-delete resilience
  (denormalized FK survives ON DELETE CASCADE from product_images)
- 20260617123455: Reconstruct missing migration — soft-delete 11 phantom audit entries (asia-* IDs)
- 20260617124547: Reconstruct missing migration — 3 performance indexes on cf_image/remediation
- 20260619140200: Close 5 stale product_no_active_image remediations
  (products deactivated since queue opened; no longer a live business issue)
- 20260619140300: Fix v_cf_orphans circular reference (root cause fix)
  cf_image was seeded from product_images — same source — so orphan view always returned 0.
  Fix: restrict v_cf_orphans to crawl_run_id IS NOT NULL (real CF API data only).
  Partial crawl bf9095c3 (pages 1–8, 800 images, status=partial) closes the loop.

Runbook (P6):
- docs/runbooks/CF_RECONCILIATION.md updated with circular reference root cause analysis,
  CASCADE FK risk, 14 triggers caveat, missing migrations gap, and full crawl job procedure.
